notes: Core snake mechanics work well with proper collision, food, scoring, speed increase, and pause; minor issue with the tail-collision exception logic being overly permissive, and the HUD text renders over the snake in the top-left corner.
Excellent implementation with a robust game loop and nice visuals, though it drops rapid secondary inputs instead of queuing them and leaks a global variable.

Solid basic Snake with working movement, growth, pause, restart, and scoring, but it has at least one stray global/undefined variable issue risk, inconsistent pause/start key behavior, and some polish gaps that keep it well short of a top score.
